nasb.text: According to all that I am going to show you, as the pattern of the tabernacle and the pattern of all its furniture, just so you shall construct it.

esv.text: Exactly as I show you concerning the pattern of the tabernacle, and of all its furniture, so you shall make it.

cnv.text: 按著我指示你建造會幕和一切器具的樣式，你們要照樣建造。

ccb.text: 你们要照我的指示去造圣幕和里面各样的器具。
